context: The French market was fully digital. Belgian-born Stromae's 'Alors on danse' became a European anthem. The FIFA World Cup made Shakira's 'Waka Waka' inescapable. David Guetta was at the height of his global crossover from French house to pop.

tracks.title: Gettin' Over You
tracks.artist: David Guetta feat. Chris Willis, Fergie & LMFAO
